description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds C++ code in multiple variants. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events. It should use a matrix strategy to build the code in different environments, including CPU, CUDA, CUDA 12.0, ROCm, and Clang. For each variant, it should install dependencies, build the code, and test that certain files exist. A second job should run after the build job and check if all build jobs succeeded.
